title: 有馬記念の後に・『最強』

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We have our winner! The top runner is none other
than Mihono Bouuurbooon!
Wooooo!

Thunderous applause fills the air as Mihono
Bourbon crosses the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon's number one!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Bourbon! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Checking... feelings. Analysis... unclear.

She looks up at the stands with tears running
down her face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Th-these tears won't stop. I cannot find the cause
and need immediate assistance—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is this what "happiness" feels like?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Reporting. I... I won!

The applause at the racecourse continues until
Mihono Bourbon's tears finally stop.

The next day, Mihono Bourbon's victory is all
over the news.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Mihono Bourbon scored a stunning victory at the
hotly contested Arima Kinen."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There are interviews with spectators included
below.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
"She started out as a sprinter, but she's been
training her hardest every single day!"

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
"She proved that stamina can be supplemented
through hard work."

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
"Watching her do her best made me want to work
harder too!"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"The spectators who were interviewed all spoke
passionately about Mihono Bourbon."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Everyone was skeptical of her chances at first,
and we have to admit that we, as journalists, were
no different."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"But she proved us all wrong when she won this
2,500-meter race that was packed with the best
of the best."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: "No one can stand in her way now."

Mihono Bourbon stares intently at the article
she's reading.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you think I've completed my mission?

After telling her about how her running has
inspired people of all backgrounds, she smiles
bashfully at me.

After telling her about how her running has
inspired people of all backgrounds, she smiles
bashfully at me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I feel great "pride."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm ready for your next request.
With that, we head out for a run on the track.
